expected_outcome: Proficient Python developer capable of writing clean, object-oriented, testable code and building intermediate-level web and automation projects.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily solving coding exercises on websites like HackerRank or Exercism.

mini_project.title: Calculator & Password Generator
mini_project.description: A terminal-based menu-driven calculator that keeps history, and a robust random password generator with criteria options (letters, digits, symbols).

phases.milestone: Comfortable with core syntax, writing procedural scripts, and using standard library math/random packages.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily building small scripts to manipulate files and parse log datasets.

mini_project.title: Student Management & Log Analyzer
mini_project.description: A console application that loads and saves student records to a JSON file, and a script to read a web server log file and count request types.

phases.milestone: Mastered collection data types, error resilient code, and structured data handling (JSON/CSV).

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily designing class hierarchies for simulated real-world scenarios (e.g. banking system).

mini_project.title: Library Catalog or Bank Account Manager
mini_project.description: An object-oriented library management system with Book, Member, and Transaction classes implementing borrowing logic.

phases.milestone: Deep understanding of how to organize large programs using classes, objects, and abstract layers.

topics.name: HTTP Protocols & Web API client
subtopics: Parsing response data from third-party APIs

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily building and testing REST APIs locally.

mini_project.title: Task Manager REST API
mini_project.description: A FastAPI microservice that performs CRUD operations on a SQLite database representing tasks, complete with validation.

phases.milestone: Able to interface Python with database systems, make external web requests, and build functional RESTful endpoints.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce Inventory API & Command Center
major_projects.description: A full-scale backend system with authentication (JWT), role-based permissions, an SQLite/PostgreSQL database integration via SQLAlchemy, and a clean admin CLI tool to monitor inventory status.

major_projects.title: Automated Web Scraper and Data Reporter
major_projects.description: A concurrent web scraping utility using BeautifulSoup and asyncio that extracts prices from multiple websites, saves data to SQLite, and sends an automated HTML email report using smtplib.
